title: End Remastered Dimension Compat
description: Makes End Remastered compatible with mods that add End Portal Frames within the End dimension like Dungeons and Taverns!
body:
This mod is a fix for [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) that allows Eyes of Ender to be used on End Portal Frames located within the End dimension.

"Why would you need that?" you may ask.

This mod makes End Remastered compatible with mods that add End Portal Frames within the End dimension like [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)!

Check the gallery for an example.
